cleavage agent: On-bead digestion was carried out overnight at 37° C with trypsin (sequencing grade, Roche Basel, Swietzerland)
enrichment method: affinity purification coupled to mass spectrometry (MS)
instrument: Peptides were analysed with online nanoLC-MS/MS on an Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
labeling: the mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium
reduction reagent: Peptides were then resuspended in 20 mM TCEP and formic acid was added
reduction concentration: Peptides were then resuspended in 20 mM TCEP
